header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.text: Faigh oidis ó thíortha ar fud an domhain
header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Brabhsáil oidis bhunaidh ó chistineacha ar fud an domhain
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Broth cnámh muice saibhir le chashu bog, ubh bogbhruite, agus núdail úr.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Cur síos ar oidis Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Píotsa Neapolitan clasaiceach le trátaí San Marzano, mozzarella úr, agus basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Cur síos ar oidis Píotsa Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos muice marinated le pina, cilantro, agus oinniún ar tortillaí arbhar.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Cur síos ar oidis Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Cearc bog i anlann trátaí uachtarach agus im le spíosraí boladhach.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Cur síos ar oidis Cearc Im.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Núdail ríse friochta le smábha, tofu, peanuts, agus anlann tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Cur síos ar oidis Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crêpes tanaí, mín líonta le Nutella, sútha talún úr, agus uachtar gealaithe.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Cur síos ar oidis Crêpes Francacha.
